King Kong (2005)

Theatrical Performance
Domestic Box Office $218,080,025Details
International Box Office $338,826,353
Worldwide Box Office $556,906,378
Domestic Physical Disc Sales
DVD Sales (estimated) $142,420,087
Blu-ray Sales (estimated) $4,553,337
Total $146,973,424
Further financial details...

Metrics

Opening Weekend:$50,130,145 (23.0% of total gross)
Legs:4.35 (domestic box office/biggest weekend)
Domestic Share:39.2% (domestic box office/worldwide)
Production Budget:$207,000,000 (worldwide box office is 2.7 times production budget)
Theater counts:3,568 opening theaters/3,627 max. theaters, 6.5 weeks average run per theater
Infl. Adj. Dom. BO $404,533,557

Movie Details

Domestic Releases: December 14th, 2005 (Wide) by Universal
International Releases: December 14th, 2005 (Wide) (New Zealand)
August 7th, 2025 (Limited) (New Zealand)
Video Release: March 28th, 2006 by Universal Home Entertainment
MPA Rating: PG-13 for frightening adventure violence and some disturbing images.
Running Time: 189 minutes
Franchise: King Kong
Cast, crew, or production detail: Motion Capture Performance, Remake, Visual Effects
Plot point: Animals Gone Bad, Creature Feature
Subgenre: Action Adventure
Source:Original Screenplay
Genre:Adventure
Production Method:Animation/Live Action
Creative Type:Fantasy
Production/Financing Companies: Wingnut Films
Production Countries: New Zealand, United States
Languages: English
